Author: @erioxff785
Text:
I am from a middle-class family. my father earns 25k to 30k per month, and my mom is a housewife. For my better future, my dad is sending me to college, whose monthly fee is 10k per month. My 12th grade is going to finish in 1.5 months. What should I do now? Stay in this country for the next 4 years? What after 4 years? If I were successful in the field I am in, I would earn a maximum of 50k to 2 lakh per month, which has very little chance. Is that sufficient? Okay, my dream is to get a car and buy a house. A house costs around 2.5 cr to 3 cr, which may take around 20 to 25 years for me to buy the house I want, and a car costs 20 to 30 lakhs, which may take 2 to 3 years for me. To complete my dream, it may take 25+ years. I am 18 years old, and at that age, I may be 40 to 45+ years. Will I be happy? Will my parents still be there to see the success they have been waiting for? I am scared of my life in this country.
My neighbor's son went to Dubai to work as a staff for 13 years and now has been promoted to manager and earns more than 10 lakhs. He built a beautiful home and owns a car. His parents have gold necklaces, bracelets, and rings. He is 31 years old, I guess, and has a good life.
Seeing all this, will I still like to live in this country? Of course not! Yes, I love my country, but can't forget the sacrifices my parents have done for me so far.

Author: @riteshdhungel9932
Text:
As someone who stayed abroad for almost a decade and currently in Nepal, my view points on why Youths are leaving (and will continue to leave):
1) Pressure from family and society. Aruko chora chori le esto garyo testo kinyo etc. People here feel discouraged.
2) To much talk only about politics jata gaye pani. Blaming Netas for everything while not realizing how corrupt we have become. Corruption in rampant in this country.
3) Blame game, j ni arulai dos layo.
4) Country cant just survive on IT sector ko ali ali jobs, we need to create niche exports for long-term to create jobs outside IT.
5) People need to stop being individualistic and work for greater good.

6) Solid Development roadmaps.

I am still bullish on Nepal and will continue to work here till its possible to sustain livelihood.

yo short life ko lagi yeti saharai struggle kina jaba ki after 2nd generation pa6i tmi ko ho and tmro identity nai yo sansar ma pani thiyeu bhane tmro nati natini le pani birsisakeko hun6a so i would say enjoy your life
Be serious but dont make life too complicated
Because gora haru ko hamro jati love attachment hudaina and last ma kamayera basna jane old orphanage (age care) plus mortgage debt trap ma fasne ta ho jindagi bhari nai
Note
aba marera lanu nai k 6a ra jindagi ma
ek6in dukha garnu target plan banaunu 10 yrs 15 yrs tespa6i afu pani 35 40 plus hun6a baki 15 yrs old age tesai katihal6a
Plus you will interact with your neighbourhood, your relatives and your loved ones in your own country
At least you are fulfiling your respects towards your own country
And another thing, you dont have to be soldier to protect country so returning back and serving as retire would be also count as u are doing your responsibility and serving your country
Thats my opinion
And everyone has their own perception
Thank u and sorry if u dont accept my views

Life is mess jasto jagcha at the age of 23

Ahile afno decision ra pariwar ko umer, ichya ra vawisyasochna parne cha
Hope everything goes right
Never stop studying
Never pause your passion
Go with flow

And you should
Time na aaie kei hunna yei garxu vaney ni baira garxu vaney ni
Patience is the key
Just enjoy, cheers to the life we got to live😃❤️
Go green☘️

Text:
म पनि आशावादी छु।।
सके सम्म नेपाल मै।।
बिदेश गैएला तर कुनै पनि हालतमा देश त्याग्ने छैन।।
मेरो पुस्ताले भोगेको असुविधा मेरा पछिको पुस्ताले भोग्न नपरोस त्यस्का निम्ति आफुले सकेका हर प्रयास गर्ने छु।।
धनी गरिब हुन सक्छ तर गरिब कहिले गरिब हुदैन उ सङ्ग विकल्प मात्र धरी बन्ने हुन्छ।।

सुदिप भाइ सुवेदी लगायत टिम लाई मनै देखि धन्यवाद सोच अनुरुप कुरा मिले आउने भविष्यमा तपाईंहरु लगायत सजककर्ता हरुलाइ भौतिक र अभौतिक सम्मान पक्कै पनि गर्ने छ पुस्ताले।।
अन्ततःसमाजमा रहेका मिथिया बेथिती,गलत संप्रेषणको चिरफार गर्दै समाधान वा विकल्प सहित थप जानकारी फैलाउदै जान हार्दिक अनुरोध गर्दछु।।

Author: @DigitalSaugat
Text:
Really insightful video brother. I was waiting for someone to share how massive opportunities are there in FREELANCING since I have been doing and teaching it for almost 7 years now.

The main problem is the lack of payment receiving methods in Nepal. We live in an era where everything is digital around us but we as a country has been pushed away to access the huge potential of digitalization.

A huge number of freelancers are arising in Nepal these days and more will be in future. If more laws are made in the favor for Freelancers then yes more people will prefer to stay in Nepal rather than going abroad leaving their friends, family and country.

More power to you guys.

Cheers!

Author: @nepalcricketanalysis626
Text:
I live in Australia. Akhir kei nai rahyo Nepal ma mero lagi.

Tyo samaj jasle ma khelda sano ma malai bigreko kta vani Tag lagayo.

Tyo samaj jasle malai SLC ma kasko chorera pass vais vanyo.

Tyo samaj jas le malai kaile ijjat garena

Tyo samaj jasma mero dady lai dukha ko ghadi ma help garna koi ayena.

Tyo samaj jaha khutta tanne manxe haru ghar ghar ma basya xan

Maile dukha bahek kei nai payena.

Tara aja awastha ferieko xa
Jaba ma saga pr vayo paisa vayo

Aja ma saga sathi huna sap khojxan
Kaile nasuneko Afanta haru le mero xora xori bolauna paro eta uti vandai bolxan
Suddenly jo manxe le malai reject garya thi aja biha garum vanxa


Nepal lai maya garxu but Nepali soch lai gardina. Australia le mero harek dukha ko ghadi ma abhiwahak sara maya gareko xa

Nepali hu but Australian pani. Dubai mero mutu ko tukda hun


Tehi sama

+2 ko result paxi mero family le nai malai Australia jaana malai suggestions diyo, maile tyo bela vaneko yaad aauxa desh mai hurkiye desh kai hawa maa saas fere ek choti prayas nagari nai xadna ta milena ni

I am optimistic about this and i can smell a lot of opportunities waiting for us
Nepal kai hawa maa saas ferna paaw, nepali mai khulera bolna paaw, nepal xadna man xaina ra jaba samma naramro sanga mero yo biswas vachidaina taba samma yo desh xadne wala xaina

Author: @basanta6120
Text:
@Laxmisharmaa26  it's unbelievable how these 7 months changed my mind. I couldn't even believe i used to think like this 7 months ago😅
A lot has happened in the last 7 months. I have been fatigued mentally, physically and emotionally.
I have currently shifted my sole focus on acca and i am leaving this country by next year.
To live in this place for a guy of my age, everyday frustration gets added and it gets difficult to not get bothered by them.
I am not saying Nepal maa kehi garna sakidaina cuz there are many people who are doing so well in Nepal. But for me, Nepal maa basera i can't achieve what i want.

Text:
I have just subscribed to your channel because I wanted to support your effort of In Depth information.
However, while watching this documentary I am intrigued to comment.
All the data you have provided are very impressive and easy to understand. Totally understand the reality. And there are good examples of returnee carrying out good projects and activities.
I hope in your next research you will also include the investment that Nepalese living abroad has carried out in Nepal.
The way I have seen is, some Nepalese living abroad at the end when they have secured their financial status they have invested in charity and carrying out small projects for their village and community development.
It might be insignificance on the vast statistics of reality but change and development is a very slow process and key player like yourselves create awareness and open paths for changes.

Text: It’s a harrowing data and almost an apocalyptic situation we are in today.  A dire situation as if South Vietnamese people desperately living Hanoi in 60s to evade the North Vietnamese communist attacks.  Today no family, household or community is immune from their near and dear working abroad.  Instead of as to how we can encourage them or facilitate their safe return  to the country our politicians such as Lal Babu Pundit and many others are up in arms with their idiotic rhetorics.  We must bring sensible changes to balance this one way traffic now or face the ruins.

Author: @crim5051
Text: 31 yr old Nepali - (British national) -  In the UK and other global economies, the rapid advancement of AI and digital systems is transforming the job landscape, leading to significant shifts in employment. Roles traditionally reliant on human input, such as administrative coding, web development, IT administration, social media management, video editing, graphic design, accountancy, and even positions like purchasing managers and administrative staff, are increasingly being automated and AI. This trend has led to notable job reductions across various sectors; for instance, PwC has released 5,000 employees, Citigroup has reduced its workforce by 4,000 to 5,000, and similar actions have been taken by Barclays, HSBC, and numerous other firms within the accounting, technology, and communications industries. In response to these changes, professionals are encouraged to pivot towards careers that are more resistant to AI disruption, focusing on areas where human expertise and creativity remain irreplaceable.

Text: ok I understand your words.... tapaiko kura ni thik ho ... maile 2022 ma mero +2 sakkeya.... ma euta lower middle class bata belong garxu .. baba yo jyami kaile kam hunxa kaile hunna... thekdar ho.. but kam huda ni poisa time am aaunna... dd ni xa who is also studying... uh aaile BBA paddai xa jasto mimimum fee hami tiiri ra xam 4 lkh for 4years... tara house rent .. khana .. gadi vada.... ghar kharcha.. yeti le savings nai hunna... i have been working from grade 11 afno family ko problem dekhera .... ... maile apply gareko xu bidesh kinaki maile ya kei dekhina... family issue le garera maile ya kei join garne himmat nai aayena... i was good student ra uta full scholarship ma IT padhna paudai xu .... maile nepal ma dherai nai collages khoje kunai ma k vanxa kunai ma k .... maile ya pade vane yearly 6 lakhs samma ma full IT cource padauxu vanne collages haru vete but after scholarships... jaba ki yedi ma bidesh gaye vane free ma padxu ... jane kharcha matra ho... ani tya gara ni aafai kamara sustain garna sakxu ... ma sanga accountant ko experience xa ... ma writer ni ho.... ra Ielts ni padauxu ... but ya kamako poisa ta ussai sakkinxa,,..... ma monthly 25-30k kamauxu after +2 tara teti ho... ya maile garna try na gareko haina.... maile 1 year aafai kamara tirxu vanera ni join garan khojekoho.... tara gahr ma poisa dida ... dd ko fee.... sabbai garda afu lai ta na pugne raixa ,.. ani desh ra baba mumi ko maya na lagne haina tara bidesh na gai kei na na hune raixa... it may hurt but it is true ... uta nai ramro xxa...

Author: @sakshamsubedi7805
Text:
hamro copies ko cover page ma lekheko hunx ni a place is only as good as the people in it tyo sacho ho. Dherai nations haru le nepal jasto difficult times bata gujreka xan. Taiwan,Singapore,Japan,South Korea,Botswana jasta countries haru pani Nepal jastai ek time ma developing thiye. Developing countries jastai US le ek time ma the great depression,Chine le Mao's famine ra hamro neighboring country India jun ahile world ko fastest growing economy baneko x ani dherai colonized bhayeka countries le aafno worst time face gareka xan. Tara tyaha ko janata na bhagera aafno desh banauna lagi rakhe tei bhayera ahile tyaha ko development dekhera hami attract hunxau. So I believe Nepal pani ek din testai developed hunx. I believe the fire of development has been lit but it will take time to turn into a blaze(but not forever). But we can only see it happen if we don't leave our country.
So everyone no matter what you choose to be in the future(doctor,engineer,microbiologist,teacher etc)you have my utmost respect if you choose to be a nepali

Author: @sushil-awasthi
Text: Mww aaile diploma in civil engineering complete garerw baseko xuu result nw aauda samma 2... 3 months ali ghum gham gare aani result aaya paxi loksewa tayari garne vanne ghr batw sujhab aaya paxi ktm aaya .. maile 12 15 din class liya paxi loksewa batw maan maryo... Mww diploma garda 1st year batw aafno filed ko software haru aani practical knowledge maa badhi dhyan diyhe aani study maa chahi pass vairakhthe testo ramro marks ko lagi vanda pani practical knowledge mai dhyan diya rww college ko sabai sathi harule teacher harule pani ramro xaa timle paxi ramro garxau vanthe... So loksewa xodeko kei din maa nai maile yeuta draftsman ko vacancy dekhe tesma apply gare aani interview ko lagi call aayo... Maile interview pani diya aani college maa gareko aafno sabai project haru dekhaya rww tyaha job pani fix vayo... Upto 3 months kaam garepaxi... Dherai thau batw privet job bekar hoo loksewa nai garnu parxa vanne aayo tarw malai tyo privet job maa testo kei tension pani vairako thiyan kaam pani maile ramro nai gareko thiya but family vanda pani social pressure vanne ki k vanne... Maile feri job xoderw loksewa maa lage aaile 1 year vayo... I can't explain kasto feel hunx....  20 barsa  matra vayo malai but tei pani ghr ko jetho xora vayarw hola dherai nai jimmedari aakko feel hunx mero family lee kaile pressure deko xain kunai kurako lagi tei pani....... Maile youtube channel maa  software haru ko tutorials upload garne gareko hunale aali network pani thikai xaa... Kaam pani halka fulka aauxa monthly basis maa... room batw nai upto 10 to 15k earn garnw sakne gari only making some plans elevation simple design haru batw aani ramro kaam garnu pare badhi nai charge garnw... Tarw aaile yo loksewa study lee garda tyo pani xode... Natw malai aafno study maa improve vayako feel hunx rww... Skill haru maa pani continue garna pako xain.... So yadi koi hunuhunx jasle kei suggest garna saknu hunx... Engineering field ko hunuhunx vane aajha better hunthyo... Cause jo pani sarkari maa paisa xain vrastachar tww garnai parxa vanxan... Yati mehenat garerw naam nikale paxi decent amount decent tarika lee kamaunw sakinna vane... Kinw garne yati mehenat ...

Author: @ThePrince1003
Text:
I will tell you what is the problem in Nepal

Unemployment: Many of my friend left Nepal because of pure unemployment. One of my friend said I will do job if I get up to 25000 but he didn’t get it. He got job in few place where salary was between 10-15k He said I will do this but even that was not paid in time

Enterperneurship or business: The money cycle and credit system is shit in Nepal. People don’t pay money for goods and services in Nepal. For example if I sell good of 20000 in credit I must do 20 visits to get money back. Chanda Insecurty etc are other factor.
Bheda: people having enough income and every body is going because u are bhedas

It is the end no change is possible in Nepal. More than 50% land of agro products are not cultivated. Nepal can be hot spot for tourism. There lot of opportunities if this brain drain can be stooped

Author: @sisnudhedo75
Text: Exodus of viable youths abroad looking for a better prospects is not a new phenomenon and Nepal is not alone on this.  This is inevitable and getting globally a new normal.  However, our own politicians made it worse, by creating an impossible situation by imposing more restrictions to those wishing to return the country.  While China, India and many countries are welcoming their citizens back to country with an open arms we are harnessing our citizens with retributions, contempts and vengefulness. Stop this nonsense, our youths have moved with time and we have definitely moved from Lal Babu Pundit’s ere.
